header.default: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 bg-transparent border-b border-transparent py-6
header.scrolled: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 transition-all duration-300 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0a0a0a]/80 border-b border-[#c9a961]/20 py-4 shadow-[0_4px_30px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)]

cards.base: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-[#c9a961]/10 transition-all duration-500

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-[#c9a961] text-[#0a0a0a] font-medium px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:bg-[#d4b775] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(201,169,97,0.4)]
buttons.outline: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl border border-[#c9a961] text-[#c9a961] font-medium px-8 py-4 transition-all hover:bg-[#c9a961]/10
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-2xl text-[#f5f1e8] font-medium px-6 py-3 transition-all hover:text-[#c9a961]

inputs.base: w-full rounded-2xl bg-[#0a0a0a] border border-[#c9a961]/20 px-6 py-4 text-[#f5f1e8] placeholder:text-[#f5f1e8]/40 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#c9a961]/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all

modals.content: bg-[#1a1a1a] border border-[#c9a961]/20 rounded-2xl p-0 overflow-hidden shadow-[0_24px_64px_rgba(0,0,0,0.8)]

motion.parallax: Apply framer-motion useScroll to hero video/image background to move at 0.5x scroll speed.
motion.reveal: Use intersection observer or framer-motion whileInView for staggering elements in sections (opacity 0 -> 1, y 20 -> 0).
motion.image_hover: Scale image inside destination cards by 1.05 on card hover using CSS transitions.

hero_video_placeholder.description: Golden clockwork mechanism on black background - use as fallback or still frame for hero background

destinations.description: Vintage black and white Paris Eiffel Tower
Artist painting in a Renaissance studio

brand_logo.description: Luxury hotel swan logo for TimeTravel Agency branding

instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
Tailwind Config Update: Add the custom colors ('#0a0a0a', '#1a1a1a', '#c9a961', '#f5f1e8') directly to the tailwind config and update border-radius to 1rem for '2xl'.
Hero Section: Full viewport height (100vh) using the provided golden clockwork image as a parallax background. Dark gradient overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text readability.
Destinations: Implement a Bento Grid using Mode A from E1's guidelines. Paris takes col-span-8 and row-span-2. Others take col-span-4.
Destination Modal: When clicking a card, open a Shadcn Dialog without standard white background. Use customized modal class.
Personalization Quiz: Use Framer Motion to animate between the 4 questions smoothly (slide-in/out). Use Shadcn RadioGroup for choices.
Chatbot Widget: Fixed bottom-right absolute positioning with a floating animation. Click opens a sleek chat window styled with anthracite background.
Always use the French language for content as requested: 'Agence de Voyage Temporel', 'Réserver', 'Nos Destinations', etc.
Test IDs: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid (e.g., 'book-now-button', 'destination-paris-card').
Use Lucide icons for UI elements, tinted in gold (#c9a961).
